mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_conversation (id, user1_id, user2_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user1_id, user2_id, last_message, last_msg_at, created_at FROM chat_conversation WHERE user1_id = #{user1Id} AND user2_id = #{user2Id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user1_id, user2_id, last_message, last_msg_at, created_at FROM chat_conversation WHERE user1_id = #{userId} OR user2_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(last_msg_at, created_at) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (id, conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
